notes.title: PIR action item completion
notes.body: Following a meeting with Juan, Linus, and Producers, we have agreed to a more focused format for the weekly PIR review, with the Head of SRE owning and prioritising action items going forward.

notes.title: Betconstruct platform incidents
notes.body: Two open incidents require Betconstruct to acknowledge: a double-bonus event bug on H2Bet and a Rewards section visibility issue on Galabet. Siria and Robert have been engaged, and we are now escalating to B2B to establish a more robust incident channel with our platform provider.
